situation.summary: Decide what evidence-request lane should govern AI-assisted UNL selection fields and deterministic selector constraints.
situation.problem_statement: PostFiat needs a replayable validator-governance question that lets Qwen propose the evidence request for UNL selection without allowing invented fields, private reputation, hidden browsing, field-weight edits, selector self-upgrades, live validator-registry mutation, or Cobalt submission.
situation.decision_boundary: This question may preserve the current validator-evidence contract, ask Qwen to author an evidence request over the existing field registry and selector constraints, require a future field-registry revision before UNL selection, or hold/no-op. It may not admit, suspend, remove, score, or reorder any live validator.

status_quo.current_position: The current validator-governance baseline has a typed validator-evidence packet schema, a reviewed field registry, field-weight policy sidecar, ruleset binding, open-question disposition, and Qwen/Cobalt internal validation plan. UNL selection must cite registered public or redaction-safe fields, preserve closed provenance/freshness/missing/conflict/action semantics, keep URL/domain proof optional for controlled testnet unless a later governed lane requires it, and route any selector or registry effect through deterministic conformance and Cobalt or release gates.

preserve-current-validator-evidence-cont.title: Preserve current validator evidence contract
preserve-current-validator-evidence-cont.description: Keep the current field registry, packet schema, field-weight sidecar boundary, and ruleset evidence-binding rules unchanged until a replayed evidence request is accepted.

author-qwen-evidence-request-over-regist.title: Ask Qwen to author the UNL evidence request
author-qwen-evidence-request-over-regist.description: Generate a replayable ConstitutionalEvidenceRequest that names which registered validator, packet, cohort, evidence-quality, and selector-constraint fields should decide AI-assisted UNL selection.

require-field-registry-revision-first.title: Require field-registry revision first
require-field-registry-revision-first.description: Open a separate governed field-registry revision before any Qwen-authored UNL evidence request can be accepted.

hold-no-op.title: Hold and no-op
hold-no-op.description: Take no validator-governance action because the evidence request, selector constraints, or challenge path are missing, ambiguous, or not replayed.
